onboarding.welcomeBody: Breath and energy across the world’s living traditions. Breathe is for well-being and contemplative practice — not medical advice.
onboarding.choosePackBody: Each tradition is a complete world of breath and energy. You can change this anytime.
onboarding.chooseLanguageBody: Available languages depend on the tradition you chose.

traditions.title: Traditions
traditions.intro: Living traditions of breath and energy — presented as belief and felt experience, never as medical fact.

learn.modernColorsNote: The familiar rainbow palette is a modern (~1977) synthesis. Classical sources give different, element-derived colors.

reflect.title: Reflect
reflect.prompt: Where did you feel the breath?
reflect.intro: Tap where you noticed something, then choose how it felt.
reflect.emptyBody: Complete a practice to capture your first felt-sense body map.
